description: Comprehensive Kafka server monitoring dashboard covering broker metrics, consumer group lag and offsets, topic configuration, and partition replication. Uses OpenTelemetry Kafka metrics receiver metrics.
title: Kafka Server Monitoring (OTLP)

widgets.description: Total number of brokers in the Kafka cluster.
widgets.title: Broker Count

widgets.description: Number of brokers in the cluster over time.
widgets.title: Broker Count Over Time

widgets.description: Log retention time configured per broker (in seconds). Requires enabling the optional kafka.broker.log_retention_period metric in the receiver.
widgets.title: Broker Log Retention Period

widgets.description: Approximate lag of each consumer group summed across all partitions of each topic. High lag indicates consumers are falling behind producers.
widgets.title: Consumer Group Lag (Sum by Topic)

widgets.description: Per-partition consumer group lag. Shows which specific partitions have the highest lag.
widgets.title: Consumer Group Lag (Per Partition)

widgets.description: Number of members in each consumer group. A drop may indicate consumer failures.
widgets.title: Consumer Group Members

widgets.description: Sum of consumer group committed offsets across partitions of each topic. Rising offsets confirm active consumption.
widgets.title: Consumer Group Offset Sum

widgets.description: Per-partition committed offset for each consumer group. Useful for tracking per-partition consumption progress.
widgets.title: Consumer Group Offset (Per Partition)

widgets.description: Difference between the current partition offset and the consumer group offset sum, showing the total unconsumed messages per topic.
widgets.title: Total Consumer Group Lag (by Group)

widgets.description: Replication factor configured per topic. Requires enabling the optional kafka.topic.replication_factor metric.
widgets.title: Topic Replication Factor

widgets.description: Minimum number of in-sync replicas required per topic. Requires enabling the optional kafka.topic.min_insync_replicas metric.
widgets.title: Topic Min In-Sync Replicas

widgets.description: Log retention period configured per topic (in seconds). Requires enabling the optional kafka.topic.log_retention_period metric.
widgets.title: Topic Log Retention Period

widgets.description: Log retention size configured per topic (in bytes). A value of -1 means infinite retention. Requires enabling the optional kafka.topic.log_retention_size metric.
widgets.title: Topic Log Retention Size

widgets.description: Current (latest) offset of each partition. Rising offsets indicate active message production.
widgets.title: Partition Current Offset

widgets.description: Oldest available offset per partition. The difference between current and oldest offset represents the data retained on disk.
widgets.title: Partition Oldest Offset

widgets.description: Total number of replicas for each partition. Should match the topic replication factor.
widgets.title: Partition Replicas

widgets.description: Number of in-sync replicas per partition. A drop below min.insync.replicas means the partition cannot accept writes with acks=all.
widgets.title: Partition In-Sync Replicas
